summary: Iteration 4 testing complete. All 19 backend regression tests passed (100%). All new UI features working: OSM standard tiles (Google Maps-like visual), Layer Control (Streets/Satellite/Terrain), ZoomControl at bottom-right, ScaleControl at bottom-left, A/B Google-style SVG pins for origin/destination, animated blue user dot, white casing under selected route polyline. Admin heatmap also uses OSM standard tiles. No regressions found.
critical_code_review_comments: OSM standard tiles (tile.openstreetmap.org) load correctly - 45+ tiles per view
Layer Control properly positioned at top-right with Streets/Satellite/Terrain options
Satellite layer uses Esri World Imagery (arcgisonline.com) - loads correctly
Terrain layer uses OpenTopoMap (opentopomap.org) - loads correctly
ZoomControl positioned at bottom-right as expected
ScaleControl positioned at bottom-left with metric units (imperial=false)
A pin (navy #0b3d91) and B pin (green #138808) SVG markers render correctly when origin/dest selected
User blue dot (#4285F4) with pulse animation (me-pulse) renders correctly
Route polyline has white casing (weight: 11) underneath selected route for Google Maps-like appearance
Admin heatmap also switched to OSM standard tiles
All existing flows (SOS, AI Chat, Incident Report, Trusted Contacts) still working
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Using existing 61+ incidents from previous iterations.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4 was purely visual/map library upgrade on frontend. No backend changes. Map tiles changed from CartoDB Voyager to OSM Standard. New features: (1) LayersControl with Streets/Satellite/Terrain at top-right, (2) ZoomControl at bottom-right, (3) ScaleControl at bottom-left, (4) Google-style A/B SVG pins for origin/destination, (5) Animated blue user dot, (6) White casing under selected route polyline. Admin heatmap also uses OSM standard. All previous features (geocoder, bulk import, SOS, AI chat, incident report, trusted contacts) still working.

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: SIMULATION mode - logs instead of sending real SMS. Response contains simulated=true

iteration_4_new: OSM standard tiles (tile.openstreetmap.org) - 45+ tiles loaded per view
LayersControl at top-right with Streets/Satellite/Terrain options
Satellite layer (Esri World Imagery) - tiles load correctly
A pin (navy #0b3d91, letter 'A') for origin - renders on map when origin selected
B pin (green #138808, letter 'B') for destination - renders on map when dest selected
User blue dot (#4285F4) with pulse animation
White casing (weight: 11) under selected route polyline
Admin heatmap uses OSM standard tiles
regression_tests: GET /api/auth/me - returns demo user with is_admin=true (passed)
AI Chat panel opens and closes (passed)
Incident Report modal opens and closes (passed)
Trusted Contacts modal opens and closes (passed)
Admin nav link visible for admin user (passed)
